title: Transplantation of Chicken Egg-White Extract-Induced Rabbit PBMCs as a Treatment for Renal Ischemia-Reperfusion Injury in Rabbits
steps: Identification of noninduced and induced PBMCs
Preparation of the rabbit renal ischemia-reperfusion injury model
Rabbit PBMC isolation, culture, induction and labeling
Changes in the urinary protein content
Observation of labeled cells in frozen sections
